hypothesis: Integrating a 3D geometric modality that encodes conformational information (such as interatomic distance matrices derived from 3D coordinates) into the unified STR-Bamba426M multimodal vocabulary will improve predictive accuracy for conformationally sensitive properties and increase fidelity of cross-representation translations, with gains most pronounced on molecules exhibiting high conformational diversity, even when 3D-geometry data is available for only a subset of the training samples.
